nodes.label: AttributeSpec
nodes.description: Typed attribute declaration attached to NodeClass or EdgeClass definitions. Specifies data type, required flag, allowed values, and documentation.
nodes.description_zh: 附加到 NodeClass 或 EdgeClass 定义的类型化属性声明。指定数据类型、必需的标志、允许的值和文档。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 类型细节 / 类型系统 / 模块模型

attr_name.description: Attribute key on the owning class

data_type.description: Logical data type of the attribute

required.description: Whether instances must populate this attribute

allowed_values.description: Enumeration members when data_type is enum

nodes.label: BenchmarkRef
nodes.description: Structured reference to an agent benchmark, task environment, metric suite, or evaluation dataset used to validate ontology coverage and runtime behavior.
nodes.description_zh: 指向智能体基准、任务环境、指标套件或评测数据集的结构化引用，用于验证本体覆盖和运行时行为。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 证据溯源 / 治理元数据

benchmark_id.description: Globally unique id with benchmark. prefix.

task_domain.description: Domain or environment family evaluated by the benchmark.

metrics.description: Metrics used to judge agent performance, robustness, safety, or completion.

nodes.label: EdgeClass
nodes.description: Schema definition for a typed directed relationship between node instances. EdgeClass specifies predicate name, source domain, target range, cardinality, optional policy hooks, and provenance.
nodes.description_zh: 节点实例之间类型化定向关系的模式定义。 EdgeClass 指定谓词名称、源域、目标范围、基数、可选策略挂钩和出处。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 类型细节 / 类型系统 / 模块模型

edge_id.description: Globally unique id with edge. prefix

source_domain.description: NodeClass id or list of allowed source types

target_range.description: NodeClass id or list of allowed target types

nodes.label: EvidenceRef
nodes.description: Provenance link from ontology constructs to external sources: academic papers, protocol specifications, diagrams, framework documentation, or standards.
nodes.description_zh: 从本体构造到外部来源的出处链接：学术论文、协议规范、图表、框架文档或标准。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 证据溯源 / 治理元数据

evidence_id.description: Globally unique id with evidence. prefix

source_name.description: Title or name of the source document

location.description: URI, file path, or citation key locating the source

nodes.label: GraphConstraint
nodes.description: Declarative integrity rule enforced over ontology instances. Constraints may target specific node or edge classes with severity levels (error, warning, info).
nodes.description_zh: 在本体实例上强制执行声明性完整性规则。约束可能针对具有严重级别（错误、警告、信息）的特定节点或边缘类别。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 约束模型 / 契约模型

constraint_id.description: Globally unique id with constraint. prefix

severity.description: Validation severity when rule is violated

nodes.label: GraphView
nodes.description: Named projection over the ontology graph for visualization, documentation, or domain-specific exploration. Filters nodes, edges, and layout strategy.
nodes.description_zh: 本体图上的命名投影，用于可视化、文档化或特定领域的探索。过滤节点、边缘和布局策略。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 投影视图

view_id.description: Globally unique id with view. prefix

root_nodes.description: Entry-point node class ids for the view

included_subgraphs.description: Subgraph ids included in this view

nodes.label: InterfaceContract
nodes.description: Behavioral contract specifying operations that implementing node classes must support. Used for validation, code generation, and cross-subgraph interoperability.
nodes.description_zh: 行为契约指定实现节点类必须支持的操作。用于验证、代码生成和跨子图互操作性。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 约束模型 / 契约模型

contract_id.description: Globally unique id with contract. prefix

operation_count.description: Number of declared operations in the contract

nodes.label: Lifecycle
nodes.description: Abstract lifecycle marker node representing active, deprecated, or removed status applied to any ontology artifact. Distinct from StateMachine which governs operational runtime states.
nodes.description_zh: 代表应用于任何本体制品的活动、弃用或删除状态的抽象生命周期标记节点。与管理操作运行时状态的 StateMachine 不同。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 证据溯源 / 治理元数据

superseded_by.description: Replacement node or edge id if deprecated

nodes.label: Namespace
nodes.description: Logical grouping and id prefix domain preventing collisions across teams, extensions, and third-party ontology modules.
nodes.description_zh: 逻辑分组和 ID 前缀域可防止团队、扩展和第三方本体模块之间发生冲突。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 证据溯源 / 治理元数据

prefix.description: Id prefix applied to nodes and edges in this namespace

nodes.label: NodeClass
nodes.description: Schema definition for a typed node in the agent ontology. NodeClass specifies identity, attributes, optional state machines, interface contracts, required edges, and evidentiary provenance.
nodes.description_zh: 智能体本体中类型化节点的模式定义。 NodeClass 指定身份、属性、可选状态机、接口契约、所需边缘和证据来源。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 类型细节 / 类型系统 / 模块模型

node_id.description: Globally unique id with node. prefix

plane.description: Optional four-plane assignment (Info, Orchestration, Memory, Tool)

attribute_schema.description: Map of attribute name to AttributeSpec references

nodes.label: OntologyGraph
nodes.description: Root container representing the complete agent ontology as a typed graph. Aggregates subgraphs, namespaces, versions, and cross-subgraph edge declarations.
nodes.description_zh: 根容器将完整的智能体本体表示为类型图。聚合子图、命名空间、版本和跨子图边缘声明。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 本体根

graph_id.description: Stable identifier for the ontology graph instance

version.description: Semantic version of the ontology release

status.description: Lifecycle status of the graph definition

nodes.label: SourceClaim
nodes.description: Atomic claim extracted from a paper, protocol, framework document, benchmark, or standard and mapped to the ontology objects it supports or challenges.
nodes.description_zh: 从论文、协议、框架文档、基准或标准中提取的原子主张，并映射到其支持或挑战的本体对象。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 证据溯源 / 治理元数据

claim_id.description: Globally unique id with claim. prefix.

source_id.description: Source catalog id that produced this claim.

ontology_impact.description: Why the claim changes, supports, or constrains ontology design.

nodes.label: StateMachine
nodes.description: Finite state machine definition governing lifecycle or operational states of node instances. Includes states, transitions, guards, and terminal conditions.
nodes.description_zh: 管理节点实例的生命周期或操作状态的有限状态机定义。包括状态、转换、防护和终止条件。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 约束模型 / 契约模型

state_machine_id.description: Globally unique id with state. prefix

nodes.label: Subgraph
nodes.description: Named module partition of the ontology covering a coherent domain such as agent core, context, memory, tools, or safety. Subgraphs contain their own node and edge class definitions plus local constraints.
nodes.description_zh: 本体的命名模块分区涵盖了一致的领域，例如智能体核心、上下文、内存、工具或安全性。子图包含自己的节点和边类定义以及局部约束。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 类型细节 / 类型系统 / 模块模型

nodes.label: Version
nodes.description: Semantic version record tracking ontology releases, changelogs, and compatibility guarantees across subgraph modules.
nodes.description_zh: 语义版本记录跟踪本体发布、变更日志和跨子图模块的兼容性保证。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 证据溯源 / 治理元数据

changelog_ref.description: Link to release notes or changelog entry

breaking_changes.description: Whether this version introduces breaking schema changes

nodes.label: Agent
nodes.description: Autonomous software entity that perceives context, maintains internal state, pursues goals through a decision loop, and acts via capabilities within defined boundaries. Central node of the agent core subgraph.
nodes.description_zh: 自主软件实体，感知上下文、维护内部状态、通过决策循环追求目标，并通过定义边界内的功能采取行动。智能体核心子图的中心节点。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 智能体根

max_iterations.description: Maximum decision loop iterations per run

nodes.label: AgentBoundary
nodes.description: Trust and permission envelope constraining what an agent may perceive, invoke, and mutate. Encodes sandbox limits, autonomy ceiling, and escalation rules.
nodes.description_zh: 信任和许可信封限制了智能体可以感知、调用和改变的内容。对沙箱限制、自治上限和升级规则进行编码。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 身份与边界

trust_tier.description: Baseline trust level for autonomous actions

human_approval_required.description: Whether sensitive actions require human gate

nodes.label: AgentIdentity
nodes.description: Stable identifier and metadata distinguishing one agent instance from another across sessions, delegations, and protocol interop.
nodes.description_zh: 稳定的标识符和元数据可跨会话、委托和协议互操作区分一个智能体实例与另一个智能体实例。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 身份与边界

owner.description: Principal or organization owning the agent

nodes.label: AgentState
nodes.description: Mutable runtime state carried across decision loop iterations: working memory, plan progress, tool results cache, and scratch variables.
nodes.description_zh: 决策循环迭代中携带的可变运行时状态：工作内存、计划进度、工具结果缓存和临时变量。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 决策控制 / 认知内核

checkpoint_id.description: Reference to persisted checkpoint if durable

nodes.label: AutonomyLevel
nodes.description: Degree of independent action permitted without human confirmation, ranging from fully supervised to fully autonomous within boundary constraints.
nodes.description_zh: 无需人工确认即可允许的独立行动程度，范围从完全监督到边界限制内的完全自主。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 身份与边界

max_tool_calls_per_turn.description: Rate limit on autonomous tool invocations

nodes.label: Capability
nodes.description: Declared affordance enabling the agent to perform a class of actions such as web search, code execution, or document analysis. Maps to tools at runtime.
nodes.description_zh: 声明的可供性使智能体能够执行一类操作，例如网络搜索、代码执行或文档分析。在运行时映射到工具。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 能力表面 / 角色与人格

risk_class.description: Inherent risk level of exercising this capability

nodes.label: CognitiveCore
nodes.description: Central reasoning substrate—typically a large language model—that performs perception over context, deliberation, and action selection within the decision loop.
nodes.description_zh: 中央推理基础——通常是一个大型语言模型——在决策循环中执行对上下文的感知、审议和行动选择。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 决策控制 / 认知内核

nodes.label: DecisionLoop
nodes.description: Iterative perceive-reason-act cycle governing agent execution. Each iteration assembles context, invokes the cognitive core, dispatches actions, ingests feedback, and updates state until termination.
nodes.description_zh: 迭代感知-推理-行动循环控制智能体执行。每次迭代都会组装上下文、调用认知核心、调度操作、获取反馈并更新状态，直到终止。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 决策控制 / 认知内核

stop_conditions.description: Conditions triggering loop exit (goal met, max iter, error)

nodes.label: FeedbackSignal
nodes.description: Evaluation or observation returned to the agent after an action: tool results, human corrections, automated scores, policy denials, or environment observations.
nodes.description_zh: 操作后返回给智能体的评估或观察：工具结果、人工更正、自动评分、策略拒绝或环境观察。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 决策控制 / 认知内核

nodes.label: Goal
nodes.description: High-level intended outcome the agent seeks to achieve. Goals drive task decomposition, capability selection, and termination conditions.
nodes.description_zh: 智能体寻求实现的高水平预期结果。目标驱动任务分解、能力选择和终止条件。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 意图模型

goal_statement.description: Natural language or formal statement of desired outcome

deadline.description: Optional temporal bound for goal achievement

nodes.label: InstructionStack
nodes.description: Ordered layers of behavioral instructions prepended to context: base system policy, developer directives, role prompts, and ephemeral run-time additions.
nodes.description_zh: 预先添加到上下文的有序行为指令层：基本系统策略、开发人员指令、角色提示和临时运行时添加。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 决策控制 / 认知内核

layer_count.description: Number of instruction layers in the stack

cache_policy.description: Prompt caching strategy for static layers

precedence.description: Rule for resolving conflicts between layers (later overrides earlier)

nodes.label: ModelInterface
nodes.description: Abstraction boundary for invoking the cognitive core: request formatting, response parsing, streaming, tool-call extraction, and error handling.
nodes.description_zh: 调用认知核心的抽象边界：请求格式化、响应解析、流式传输、工具调用提取和错误处理。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 决策控制 / 认知内核

supports_streaming.description: Whether partial output streaming is available

max_output_tokens.description: Configured output token limit per call

nodes.label: Objective
nodes.description: Mid-level milestone bridging strategic goals and executable tasks. Objectives organize work into coherent phases with intermediate deliverables.
nodes.description_zh: 连接战略目标和可执行任务的中层里程碑。目标将工作组织成具有中间可交付成果的连贯阶段。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 意图模型

measurable_metric.description: KPI or metric indicating objective satisfaction

nodes.label: Persona
nodes.description: Communicative and stylistic profile shaping tone, verbosity, and user-facing presentation without altering core capabilities or goals.
nodes.description_zh: 沟通和风格轮廓塑造语气、冗长和面向用户的演示，而不改变核心功能或目标。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 能力表面 / 角色与人格

nodes.label: Role
nodes.description: Functional specialization assigned to an agent defining expected behaviors, expertise domain, and interaction patterns within multi-agent systems.
nodes.description_zh: 分配给智能体的功能专门化，定义多智能体系统中的预期行为、专业知识领域和交互模式。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 能力表面 / 角色与人格

interaction_style.description: Default interaction mode with peers and users

nodes.label: Task
nodes.description: Atomic unit of work assigned to an agent or subagent with defined inputs, expected outputs, and lifecycle states.
nodes.description_zh: 分配给智能体或子智能体的原子工作单元，具有已定义的输入、预期输出和生命周期状态。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 意图模型

task_description.description: Actionable description of work to perform

task_type.description: Category guiding tool and workflow selection

assigned_to.description: Agent or subagent id responsible for execution

nodes.label: AgentMessage
nodes.description: Message produced by the agent including natural language responses, tool call requests, and structured reasoning outputs.
nodes.description_zh: 智能体生成的消息包括自然语言响应、工具调用请求和结构化推理输出。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 消息转录层 / 上下文容器

includes_tool_calls.description: Whether message contains tool invocation requests

nodes.label: ChunkPolicy
nodes.description: Rules governing text segmentation and truncation including chunk size, overlap, and head-tail preservation under length limits.
nodes.description_zh: 管理文本分段和截断的规则，包括块大小、重叠和长度限制下的头尾保留。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 输入表面 / 指令层

nodes.label: CommandArea
nodes.description: Active control and instruction surface within a container: system prompts, developer directives, and ephemeral run commands.
nodes.description_zh: 容器内的主动控制和指令表面：系统提示、开发人员指令和临时运行命令。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 消息转录层 / 上下文容器

nodes.label: ContainerContext
nodes.description: Bounded envelope grouping command area, storage area, and attached context sources. Mirrors the diagram Container concept for scoped agent workspaces.
nodes.description_zh: 有界信封分组命令区域、存储区域和附加的上下文源。镜像范围智能体工作区的图表容器概念。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 消息转录层 / 上下文容器

nodes.label: ContextGraph
nodes.description: Root assembly node representing the working context presented to the cognitive core: messages, instructions, retrieved chunks, and source references woven into a coherent graph structure.
nodes.description_zh: 根组装节点代表呈现给认知核心的工作上下文：消息、指令、检索到的块和源引用编织成连贯的图形结构。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 上下文根

token_budget.description: Maximum tokens allocated to assembled context

assembly_strategy.description: Algorithm for composing context from sources

nodes.label: DatabaseSource
nodes.description: Structured datastore source enabling query-backed retrieval and tool-mediated mutations with schema-aware context injection.
nodes.description_zh: 结构化数据存储源通过模式感知上下文注入支持查询支持的检索和工具介导的突变。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 来源目录 / 加载控制

trust_label.description: IFC trust classification for query results

nodes.label: DeveloperInstruction
nodes.description: Application-level directives from the integrating developer shaping agent behavior beyond base system policy.
nodes.description_zh: 来自集成开发人员的应用程序级指令塑造了超出基本系统策略的智能体行为。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 输入表面 / 指令层

nodes.label: EmbeddingSource
nodes.description: Dense vector index source combining embedding model outputs with vector store for semantic similarity retrieval.
nodes.description_zh: 密集向量索引源将嵌入模型输出与向量存储相结合以进行语义相似性检索。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 来源目录 / 加载控制

nodes.label: FewShotExample
nodes.description: Demonstration input-output pair illustrating desired task behavior for in-context learning without weight updates.
nodes.description_zh: 演示输入输出对，说明无需权重更新的上下文学习所需的任务行为。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 输入表面 / 指令层

task_tag.description: Task category this example applies to

nodes.label: FileSystemSource
nodes.description: Filesystem-backed context and action surface providing read/write access to files within trust boundaries.
nodes.description_zh: 文件系统支持的上下文和操作界面提供对信任边界内的文件的读/写访问。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 来源目录 / 加载控制

nodes.label: GraphSource
nodes.description: Structured knowledge graph used for relational retrieval, multi-hop expansion, and context assembly beyond flat chunk similarity.
nodes.description_zh: 用于关系检索、多跳扩展和超越平面块相似性的上下文组装的结构化知识图。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 来源目录 / 加载控制

nodes.label: LightIndex
nodes.description: Lightweight discovery index storing summaries, metadata, and tags enabling progressive disclosure without loading full source content.
nodes.description_zh: 轻量级发现索引存储摘要、元数据和标签，无需加载完整源内容即可实现渐进式披露。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 来源目录 / 加载控制

nodes.label: MemoryFileSource
nodes.description: File-backed persistent memory store outside the live transcript, bridging MemoryPlane recall into InfoPlane context assembly.
nodes.description_zh: 文件支持的持久内存存储在实时记录之外，将 MemoryPlane 调用桥接到 InfoPlane 上下文组件中。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 来源目录 / 加载控制

file_path.description: Path to memory file or directory

nodes.label: Message
nodes.description: Typed conversational unit in the transcript with role, content, metadata, and optional tool correlation identifiers.
nodes.description_zh: 在记录中键入对话单元，其中包含角色、内容、元数据和可选工具相关标识符。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 消息转录层 / 上下文容器

content.description: Message body text or structured content

correlation_id.description: Links related messages and tool calls

nodes.label: MessageHistory
nodes.description: Ordered sequence of prior messages retained in context per retention and truncation policy, forming the conversational transcript backbone.
nodes.description_zh: 根据保留和截断策略保留在上下文中的先前消息的有序序列，形成会话转录主干。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 消息转录层 / 上下文容器

retention_policy.description: Strategy for history management under pressure

nodes.label: NetworkSource
nodes.description: External network connectivity surface for HTTP retrieval, API calls, and remote resource fetching subject to egress policy.
nodes.description_zh: 用于 HTTP 检索、API 调用和受出口策略约束的远程资源获取的外部网络连接表面。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 来源目录 / 加载控制

trust_label.description: IFC label for fetched remote content

nodes.label: OutputChunk
nodes.description: Bounded segment of model or tool output for streaming delivery, truncation, or downstream processing.
nodes.description_zh: 用于流传输、截断或下游处理的模型或工具输出的有界段。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 输入表面 / 指令层

is_final.description: Whether this is the terminal chunk

nodes.label: ProgressiveDisclosure
nodes.description: On-demand context loading strategy deferring full content materialization until retrieval, selection, or explicit request reduces upfront token cost.
nodes.description_zh: 按需上下文加载策略将完整的内容具体化推迟到检索、选择或显式请求，从而减少了前期令牌成本。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 来源目录 / 加载控制

prefetch_depth.description: Levels of metadata to prefetch before full load

nodes.label: SkillSource
nodes.description: Packaged capability module combining instructions, tool bindings, and examples loaded as a cohesive context extension.
nodes.description_zh: 打包的功能模块结合了指令、工具绑定和作为内聚上下文扩展加载的示例。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 来源目录 / 加载控制

nodes.label: StorageArea
nodes.description: Durable or session-scoped artifact store within a container holding files, outputs, and intermediate results referenced by context assembly.
nodes.description_zh: 持久或会话范围的制品存储在包含上下文组件引用的文件、输出和中间结果的容器中。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 消息转录层 / 上下文容器

nodes.label: SystemInstruction
nodes.description: Foundational behavioral, safety, and capability instructions prepended to context on every model invocation.
nodes.description_zh: 每个模型调用的上下文中都预先添加了基本行为、安全和功能说明。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 输入表面 / 指令层

immutable.description: Whether instruction may be overridden at runtime

nodes.label: TextInput
nodes.description: Raw textual input entering the context pipeline from user queries, documents, or tool returns before chunking and indexing.
nodes.description_zh: 从用户查询、文档或工具进入上下文管道的原始文本输入在分块和索引之前返回。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 输入表面 / 指令层

nodes.label: ToolInfoSource
nodes.description: Catalog of tool metadata and summaries indexed for discovery, progressive loading, and semantic tool matching.
nodes.description_zh: 为发现、渐进式加载和语义工具匹配建立索引的工具元数据和摘要目录。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 来源目录 / 加载控制

defer_full_schema.description: Whether full schemas load only on selection

nodes.label: UserMessage
nodes.description: Message originating from the human user initiating or steering agent behavior.
nodes.description_zh: 源自人类用户发起或引导智能体行为的消息。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 消息转录层 / 上下文容器

nodes.label: Chunk
nodes.description: Raw text segment extracted from a document, conversation transcript, or knowledge source. Serves as the atomic unit for indexing and embedding.
nodes.description_zh: 从文档、对话记录或知识源中提取的原始文本片段。用作索引和嵌入的原子单元。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 记忆数据单元 / 索引存储

token_count.description: Approximate token length of the chunk

source_offset.description: Character or token offset in the source document

chunk_index.description: Sequential index within the source document

nodes.label: Contextualized Chunk
nodes.description: Chunk augmented with situating context summary that disambiguates meaning when the chunk is retrieved in isolation. Improves retrieval precision and downstream use.
nodes.description_zh: 块通过定位上下文摘要进行增强，当单独检索块时，可以消除含义的歧义。提高检索精度和下游使用。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 记忆数据单元 / 索引存储

context_summary.description: Situation summary prepended or appended to chunk text

nodes.label: Embedding Model
nodes.description: Model that maps text to dense vector representations for semantic similarity search. Defines dimensionality, distance metric, and normalization behavior.
nodes.description_zh: 将文本映射到密集向量表示以进行语义相似性搜索的模型。定义维度、距离度量和标准化行为。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 记忆数据单元 / 索引存储

max_input_tokens.description: Maximum input length the model accepts

distance_metric.description: Similarity metric used at query time

nodes.label: Episodic Memory
nodes.description: Chronologically ordered records of past events, sessions, and interactions. Each episode captures who, what, when, and situational context, enabling temporal recall and experience-based learning.
nodes.description_zh: 按时间顺序排列的过去事件、会话和交互的记录。每个情节都会捕捉人物、事件、时间和情境背景，从而实现时间回忆和基于经验的学习。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 记忆类型

nodes.label: Memory Block
nodes.description: Logical partition within a memory store grouping related records by topic, time, tenant, or access policy. Enables scoped retrieval and independent compaction.
nodes.description_zh: 内存存储中的逻辑分区，按主题、时间、租户或访问策略对相关记录进行分组。启用范围检索和独立压缩。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 记忆数据单元 / 索引存储

block_id.description: Unique identifier within the parent store

record_count.description: Approximate number of records in this block

access_tier.description: Storage tier affecting latency and cost

nodes.label: Memory Compactor
nodes.description: Summarizes, merges, and prunes memory records over time to control storage growth while preserving salient information and retrieval quality.
nodes.description_zh: 随着时间的推移汇总、合并和修剪内存记录，以控制存储增长，同时保留显着信息和检索质量。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 记忆流水线

trigger_threshold.description: Record count or size threshold triggering compaction

preserve_recent_days.description: Minimum age before records are compaction candidates

nodes.label: Memory Forgetting Policy
nodes.description: Rules governing what memory records to discard, archive, or deprioritize and under what conditions. Implements intentional forgetting to manage capacity and privacy.
nodes.description_zh: 管理哪些内存记录要丢弃、存档或取消优先级以及在什么条件下进行的规则。实施故意遗忘来管理容量和隐私。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 记忆流水线

ttl_days.description: Time-to-live in days for TTL policies

min_importance.description: Minimum importance score to retain under score-based policies

nodes.label: Memory Record
nodes.description:
Individual memory entry with content payload and rich metadata: provenance, timestamps, access counts, relevance
scores, and lifecycle state.
nodes.description_zh: 具有内容有效负载和丰富元数据的单独内存条目：出处、时间戳、访问计数、相关性分数和生命周期状态。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 记忆数据单元 / 索引存储

last_accessed_at.description: ISO timestamp of most recent retrieval

access_count.description: Number of times this record has been retrieved

nodes.label: Memory Retriever
nodes.description:
Orchestrates the full retrieval pipeline: query formulation, index lookup, rank fusion, reranking, and result
packaging for downstream consumption.
nodes.description_zh: 编排完整的检索管道：查询制定、索引查找、排名融合、重新排名和结果打包以供下游使用。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 记忆流水线

default_top_k.description: Default number of results to return

pipeline_stages.description: Ordered list of retrieval stages enabled

query_rewrite.description: Whether queries are rewritten before retrieval

nodes.label: Memory Store
nodes.description: Abstract persistent storage backend that holds memory records across sessions. May be partitioned into blocks and indexed for retrieval.
nodes.description_zh: 抽象持久存储后端，保存跨会话的内存记录。可以分为块并建立索引以供检索。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 记忆根

nodes.label: Memory Writer
nodes.description: Processes incoming content, extracts metadata, deduplicates, and persists new memory records to the appropriate store and indexes.
nodes.description_zh: 处理传入内容、提取元数据、删除重复数据并将新内存记录保存到适当的存储和索引中。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 记忆流水线

deduplication.description: Whether duplicate content is detected and skipped

auto_index.description: Whether new records are automatically indexed

nodes.label: Preference Memory
nodes.description: Learned user and agent preferences, stylistic biases, and default choices accumulated over interactions. Influences response tone, tool selection, and personalization.
nodes.description_zh: 通过交互积累了了解的用户和智能体偏好、风格偏见和默认选择。影响响应语气、工具选择和个性化。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 记忆类型

decay_factor.description: Rate at which unused preferences lose weight over time

explicit_only.description: Whether only explicitly stated preferences are stored

nodes.label: Procedural Memory
nodes.description: Stored skills, workflows, action sequences, and tool usage patterns that guide how the agent performs tasks. Encodes how-to knowledge rather than declarative facts.
nodes.description_zh: 存储的技能、工作流程、操作序列和工具使用模式可指导智能体如何执行任务。编码操作知识而不是声明性事实。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 记忆类型

execution_mode.description: How procedures are applied at runtime

last_used_at.description: ISO timestamp of most recent procedure invocation

nodes.label: Rank Fusion
nodes.description: Component that merges multiple retrieval score lists from heterogeneous indexes into a unified ranking, commonly using reciprocal rank fusion or weighted combination.
nodes.description_zh: 将异构索引中的多个检索评分列表合并为统一排名的组件，通常使用倒数排名融合或加权组合。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 检索排序 / 检索输出

source_weights.description: Per-index weight map for weighted fusion

nodes.label: Reranker
nodes.description: Cross-encoder or language-model-based component that re-scores candidate results for query-document relevance after initial retrieval.
nodes.description_zh: 跨编码器或基于语言模型的组件，可在初始检索后重新对查询文档相关性的候选结果进行评分。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 检索排序 / 检索输出

top_k_output.description: Number of results returned after reranking

nodes.label: Semantic Memory
nodes.description: Structured factual knowledge, world models, and concept relations independent of the specific episode in which they were learned. Supports generalization, inference, and cross-session knowledge reuse.
nodes.description_zh: 结构化的事实知识、世界模型和概念关系独立于学习的具体情节。支持泛化、推理和跨会话知识重用。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 记忆类型

schema_version.description: Version of the knowledge schema or ontology used

confidence_threshold.description: Minimum confidence for facts to be treated as reliable

update_mode.description: How new facts integrate with existing knowledge

nodes.label: Sparse Index
nodes.description: Lexical index supporting keyword matching via TF-IDF, BM25, or related sparse retrieval methods. Complements dense vector search for exact-term recall.
nodes.description_zh: 支持通过 TF-IDF、BM25 或相关稀疏检索方法进行关键字匹配的词法索引。补充密集向量搜索以实现精确术语召回。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 记忆数据单元 / 索引存储

document_count.description: Number of indexed documents or chunks

nodes.label: Vector Index
nodes.description: Approximate nearest neighbor index for fast semantic similarity search over embedding vectors. Supports configurable recall-latency tradeoffs.
nodes.description_zh: 用于对嵌入向量进行快速语义相似性搜索的近似最近邻索引。支持可配置的召回延迟权衡。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 记忆数据单元 / 索引存储

ef_search.description: Search-time parameter controlling recall vs speed

nodes.label: Vector Store
nodes.description: Persistent storage layer for embedding vectors with associated metadata and chunk identifiers. Often paired with a vector index for query acceleration.
nodes.description_zh: 用于嵌入具有关联元数据和块标识符的向量的持久存储层。通常与向量索引配对以实现查询加速。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 记忆数据单元 / 索引存储

nodes.label: Virtual Context
nodes.description: Reconstructed context assembled on demand from long-term memory when the active working memory window cannot hold all relevant information.
nodes.description_zh: 当活动工作记忆窗口无法容纳所有相关信息时，根据需要从长期记忆中组装重建上下文。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 检索排序 / 检索输出

max_tokens.description: Token budget for assembled virtual context

freshness_requirement.description: Maximum age of included memory for time-sensitive tasks

nodes.label: Working Memory
nodes.description:
Active, bounded context window holding the agent''s current focus: recent messages, retrieved snippets, and
in-flight reasoning. Capacity is constrained by token or slot limits and subject to eviction when new information arrives.
nodes.description_zh: 活动的有界上下文窗口保持智能体的当前焦点：最近的消息、检索到的片段和正在进行的推理。容量受到令牌或插槽限制的限制，并且在新信息到达时会被驱逐。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 记忆类型

capacity_tokens.description: Maximum token budget for active context

eviction_policy.description: Strategy for removing content when capacity is exceeded

refresh_interval_ms.description: Optional periodic refresh cadence for volatile entries

nodes.label: Branch Evaluator
nodes.description: Component that scores, ranks, or selects among alternative reasoning branches in a search space based on heuristics, value estimates, or learned models.
nodes.description_zh: 基于启发式、价值估计或学习模型在搜索空间中的替代推理分支中进行评分、排名或选择的组件。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 搜索空间 / 规划循环

evaluation_criteria.description: List of criteria used for branch scoring

selection_method.description: How the winning branch is chosen

nodes.label: Confidence Estimate
nodes.description: Quantified confidence score attached to a conclusion, plan step, or prediction, typically on a calibrated probability or ordinal scale.
nodes.description_zh: 附加到结论、计划步骤或预测的量化置信度得分，通常采用校准概率或序数尺度。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 认知置信控制 / 反思控制

target_ref.description: Reference to the entity being scored

nodes.label: Plan
nodes.description: Structured sequence of steps toward achieving a goal, including dependencies, preconditions, expected outcomes, and rollback points.
nodes.description_zh: 实现目标的结构化步骤序列，包括依赖性、先决条件、预期结果和回滚点。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 搜索空间 / 规划循环

step_count.description: Number of steps in the plan

goal_description.description: Natural language description of the plan goal

nodes.label: Planning Process
nodes.description: Goal-directed process that decomposes objectives into structured plans with ordered steps, dependencies, and contingency handling.
nodes.description_zh: 以目标为导向的流程，将目标分解为具有有序步骤、依赖性和应急处理的结构化计划。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 搜索空间 / 规划循环

goal_id.description: Identifier of the goal being planned for

replan_count.description: Number of replanning iterations so far

nodes.label: Plan Step
nodes.description: Individual action or decision within a plan, binding to a concrete action in the action space with preconditions and expected effects.
nodes.description_zh: 计划内的个人行动或决定，与行动空间中的具体行动绑定，具有先决条件和预期效果。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 搜索空间 / 规划循环

action_ref.description: Reference to the bound action or tool

preconditions.description: Conditions that must hold before step execution

nodes.label: Reasoning Process
nodes.description: Abstract computation that transforms inputs into conclusions through logical, analogical, or generative inference. May operate within a bounded search space.
nodes.description_zh: 通过逻辑、类比或生成推理将输入转化为结论的抽象计算。可以在有限的搜索空间内操作。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 推理根

nodes.label: Reasoning Trace
nodes.description: Recorded sequence of reasoning steps, intermediate conclusions, and branch decisions enabling audit, replay, and debugging of agent cognition.
nodes.description_zh: 记录推理步骤、中间结论和分支决策的顺序，以便对智能体认知进行审核、重播和调试。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 认知置信控制 / 反思控制

completed.description: Whether the reasoning run finished normally

nodes.label: Reflection
nodes.description: Self-assessment of reasoning quality, output correctness, or plan adequacy performed after a reasoning or action episode.
nodes.description_zh: 在推理或行动事件后对推理质量、输出正确性或计划充分性进行自我评估。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 认知置信控制 / 反思控制

nodes.label: Replanning Trigger
nodes.description: Condition or event that forces revision of an active plan, such as step failure, environment change, new information, or self-critique findings.
nodes.description_zh: 迫使修改现行计划的条件或事件，例如步骤失败、环境变化、新信息或自我批评的结果。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 搜索空间 / 规划循环

severity.description: Whether replanning is suggested or mandatory

nodes.label: Search Space
nodes.description: Tree or graph of possible reasoning branches representing alternative inference paths, hypotheses, or plan variants under exploration.
nodes.description_zh: 可能的推理分支的树或图，表示正在探索的替代推理路径、假设或计划变体。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 搜索空间 / 规划循环

node_count.description: Number of thought nodes in the space

nodes.label: Self Critique
nodes.description: Explicit identification of errors, weaknesses, gaps, or uncertainties in reasoning output or plan structure, often triggering replanning.
nodes.description_zh: 明确识别推理输出或计划结构中的错误、弱点、差距或不确定性，通常会触发重新计划。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 认知置信控制 / 反思控制

actionable.description: Whether critique includes concrete remediation suggestions

nodes.label: Stopping Condition
nodes.description: Criteria for terminating a reasoning or planning process, including success, failure, budget exhaustion, convergence, or timeout.
nodes.description_zh: 终止推理或规划过程的标准，包括成功、失败、预算耗尽、收敛或超时。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 预算与终止

threshold.description: Numeric threshold for the condition when applicable

nodes.label: Thinking Budget
nodes.description: Token, time, or cost limit imposed on reasoning and planning activities to prevent unbounded computation and control resource consumption.
nodes.description_zh: 对推理和规划活动施加令牌、时间或成本限制，以防止无限计算并控制资源消耗。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 预算与终止

hard_limit.description: Whether exceeding budget is strictly forbidden

nodes.label: Thought Edge
nodes.description: Transition between two thought nodes representing a reasoning step, inference rule application, or branch expansion in the search space.
nodes.description_zh: 两个思维节点之间的转换，表示搜索空间中的推理步骤、推理规则应用或分支扩展。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 搜索空间 / 规划循环

cost.description: Computational or token cost of this transition

nodes.label: Thought Node
nodes.description: Single reasoning state within a search space, representing an intermediate conclusion, hypothesis, or partial plan at a point in the exploration.
nodes.description_zh: 搜索空间内的单一推理状态，表示探索中某个点的中间结论、假设或部分计划。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 搜索空间 / 规划循环

content.description: Text or structured representation of the thought

score.description: Heuristic or evaluator score for this node

depth.description: Depth from the root of the search space

is_terminal.description: Whether this node represents a final conclusion

nodes.label: Uncertainty State
nodes.description: Representation of the agent's epistemic uncertainty about facts, conclusions, or plan outcomes, including known unknowns and confidence gaps.
nodes.description_zh: 表示主体对事实、结论或计划结果的认知不确定性，包括已知的未知数和置信度差距。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 认知置信控制 / 反思控制

affected_claims.description: Claims or steps subject to uncertainty

nodes.label: Action Space
nodes.description: Universe of all actions available to an agent, partitioned into internal (cognitive) and external (environment-affecting) actions.
nodes.description_zh: 智能体可用的所有操作的范围，分为内部（认知）和外部（影响环境）操作。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 动作根

nodes.label: Browser Action
nodes.description: Web page navigation, form filling, element interaction, and data extraction within a browser environment.
nodes.description_zh: 浏览器环境中的网页导航、表单填写、元素交互和数据提取。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 动作分类

nodes.label: Code Execution Action
nodes.description: Action that runs generated or provided code in a sandboxed environment with restricted permissions and resource limits.
nodes.description_zh: 在具有受限权限和资源限制的沙盒环境中运行生成或提供的代码的操作。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 动作分类

nodes.label: Computer Use Action
nodes.description: Action involving GUI interaction via visual observation (screenshots) and simulated mouse/keyboard input to operate desktop applications.
nodes.description_zh: 涉及通过视觉观察（屏幕截图）和模拟鼠标/键盘输入进行 GUI 交互以操作桌面应用程序的操作。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 动作分类

nodes.label: Deferred Tool Definition
nodes.description: Tool definition loaded lazily at selection time rather than upfront in context. Reduces initial context size while preserving discoverability.
nodes.description_zh: 工具定义在选择时延迟加载，而不是在上下文中预先加载。减少初始上下文大小，同时保持可发现性。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 工具定义平面 / 工具发现平面

defer_loading.description: Must be true for deferred definitions

discovery_hint.description: Minimal hint text for search-based loading

load_on_select.description: Whether full schema loads upon selection

nodes.label: External Action
nodes.description:
Any action that produces observable side effects in the environment: tool calls, file operations, network requests,
or GUI interactions.
nodes.description_zh: 在环境中产生可观察到的副作用的任何操作：工具调用、文件操作、网络请求或 GUI 交互。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 动作分类

reversible.description: Whether the action can be undone

nodes.label: File Action
nodes.description: File system operations including read, write, delete, move, and metadata inspection within permitted paths.
nodes.description_zh: 文件系统操作包括在允许的路径内读取、写入、删除、移动和元数据检查。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 动作分类

nodes.label: GUI Action
nodes.description: Desktop graphical user interface element interaction including window management, menu selection, and widget manipulation.
nodes.description_zh: 桌面图形用户界面元素交互包括窗口管理、菜单选择和小部件操作。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 动作分类

element_selector.description: Selector or identifier for target UI element

nodes.label: Internal Action
nodes.description:
Action with no direct environment side effect: reasoning, retrieval, learning, or memory operations that occur
entirely within the agent''s cognitive boundary.
nodes.description_zh: 没有直接环境副作用的动作：完全发生在智能体认知边界内的推理、检索、学习或记忆操作。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 动作分类

nodes.label: Network Action
nodes.description: HTTP, socket, or API network calls to external services with request/response handling and timeout management.
nodes.description_zh: 通过请求/响应处理和超时管理对外部服务进行 HTTP、套接字或 API 网络调用。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 动作分类

nodes.label: Programmatic Tool Calling
nodes.description: Pattern where the agent generates orchestration code that invokes multiple tools in sequence or parallel within a controlled execution environment.
nodes.description_zh: 智能体生成编排代码的模式，该代码在受控执行环境中按顺序或并行调用多个工具。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 调用平面

max_tools_per_script.description: Maximum tools invokable in one script

nodes.label: Side Effect
nodes.description: Observable state change in the environment caused by an external action, requiring policy authorization and audit logging.
nodes.description_zh: 由外部操作引起的环境中可观察的状态变化，需要策略授权和审核日志记录。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 动作分类

reversible.description: Whether the effect can be rolled back

audit_required.description: Whether the effect must be audit-logged

nodes.label: Tool Call
nodes.description: Request to invoke a tool with specific arguments, issued by the agent before authorization and execution.
nodes.description_zh: 使用特定参数调用工具的请求，由智能体在授权和执行之前发出。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 调用平面

nodes.label: Tool Definition
nodes.description:
Schema and metadata bundle describing a callable tool: its inputs, outputs, behavior description, and operational
characteristics.
nodes.description_zh: 描述可调用工具的架构和元数据包：其输入、输出、行为描述和操作特征。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 工具定义平面 / 工具发现平面

defer_loading.description: Whether definition is loaded lazily at selection time

deprecated.description: Whether the tool is marked deprecated

nodes.label: Tool Discovery
nodes.description: Process of finding relevant tools from a registry or catalog given a task description, context, or explicit query.
nodes.description_zh: 在给定任务描述、上下文或显式查询的情况下，从注册表或目录中查找相关工具的过程。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 工具定义平面 / 工具发现平面

max_candidates.description: Maximum tools to surface per discovery run

nodes.label: Tool Error
nodes.description: Error returned from failed tool execution, including error code, message, and optional retry guidance.
nodes.description_zh: 工具执行失败返回的错误，包括错误代码、消息和可选的重试指南。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 调用平面

retryable.description: Whether the call can be retried

nodes.label: Tool Invocation
nodes.description: Actual execution instance of a tool call, including runtime context, executor binding, and streaming state.
nodes.description_zh: 工具调用的实际执行实例，包括运行时上下文、执行器绑定和流状态。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 调用平面

nodes.label: Tool Match
nodes.description: Scored candidate tool returned from a search operation, including relevance score and match rationale.
nodes.description_zh: 从搜索操作返回的评分候选工具，包括相关性分数和匹配理由。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 工具定义平面 / 工具发现平面

match_reason.description: Explanation of why this tool matched

tool_ref.description: Reference to the matched tool definition

nodes.label: Tool Metadata
nodes.description:
Descriptive metadata for a tool: human-readable name, description, version, estimated cost, latency hints, and
categorization tags.
nodes.description_zh: 工具的描述性元数据：人类可读的名称、描述、版本、估计成本、延迟提示和分类标签。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 工具定义平面 / 工具发现平面

description.description: Natural language description of tool purpose

nodes.label: Tool Registry
nodes.description: Collection of available tool definitions indexed for discovery and invocation, serving as the authoritative catalog of agent capabilities.
nodes.description_zh: 为发现和调用建立索引的可用工具定义的集合，充当智能体功能的权威目录。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 工具定义平面 / 工具发现平面

last_updated_at.description: ISO timestamp of last registry update

nodes.label: Tool Result
nodes.description: Structured output returned from successful tool execution, conforming to the tool's output schema.
nodes.description_zh: 成功执行工具返回的结构化输出，符合工具的输出架构。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 调用平面

content_type.description: MIME or schema type of result

truncated.description: Whether result was truncated due to size limits

nodes.label: Tool Schema
nodes.description: JSON Schema or equivalent structured definition of a tool's input parameters and output format, enabling validation and code generation.
nodes.description_zh: JSON 架构或工具输入参数和输出格式的等效结构化定义，支持验证和代码生成。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 工具定义平面 / 工具发现平面

nodes.label: Tool Search
nodes.description: Query-based matching of tools using lexical, regex, or embedding similarity over tool names, descriptions, and schemas.
nodes.description_zh: 使用词汇、正则表达式或工具名称、描述和模式的嵌入相似性进行基于查询的工具匹配。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 工具定义平面 / 工具发现平面

nodes.label: Tool Selection
nodes.description: Decision process choosing which matched tool or tool combination to invoke for the current task, considering scores, policies, and context.
nodes.description_zh: 决策过程考虑分数、策略和上下文，选择为当前任务调用哪个匹配的工具或工具组合。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 工具定义平面 / 工具发现平面

selection_strategy.description: How the final tool is chosen

nodes.label: Tool Server
nodes.description: Process that serves tool definitions and handles invocation requests, exposing a callable interface to the agent runtime.
nodes.description_zh: 提供工具定义和处理调用请求、向智能体运行时公开可调用接口的进程。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 工具定义平面 / 工具发现平面

nodes.label: Tool Warning
nodes.description: Non-fatal warning emitted during tool execution indicating partial success, deprecation, or suboptimal conditions.
nodes.description_zh: 工具执行期间发出非致命警告，指示部分成功、弃用或次优条件。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 调用平面

nodes.label: Blackboard
nodes.description:
Shared mutable state accessible to multiple agents for posting hypotheses, partial results, and coordination
signals without direct pairwise messaging.
nodes.description_zh: 多个智能体可以访问共享可变状态，用于发布假设、部分结果和协调信号，而无需直接成对消息传递。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 共享状态

entry_schema.description: Schema for records posted to the blackboard.

retention_policy.description: Rules for entry expiration and archival.

nodes.label: Consensus Policy
nodes.description:
Rules defining how multiple agents reach agreement on outputs, decisions, or shared state updates, including
quorum, voting weights, and tie-breaking.
nodes.description_zh: 定义多个智能体如何就输出、决策或共享状态更新达成一致的规则，包括法定人数、投票权重和打破平局。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 并行控制 / 委派控制

quorum_fraction.description: Minimum participant fraction required for a valid decision.

timeout_action.description: Behavior when consensus is not reached in time.

nodes.label: Delegation Contract
nodes.description:
Formal terms governing what a delegate may read, write, invoke, and return, including permission scope, time
limits, and escalation conditions.
nodes.description_zh: 管理委托可以读取、写入、调用和返回内容的正式条款，包括权限范围、时间限制和升级条件。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 并行控制 / 委派控制

allowed_actions.description: Explicit set of permitted operation types for the delegate.

denied_actions.description: Explicit set of forbidden operation types.

time_limit_seconds.description: Maximum duration of the delegation before automatic revocation.

escalation_on_violation.description: Whether policy violations trigger escalation to the delegator.

nodes.label: Evaluator
nodes.description:
A quality and correctness assessor that scores, validates, or rejects outputs against criteria, rubrics, or
reference answers without modifying the original artifact.
nodes.description_zh: 质量和正确性评估器，可根据标准、量规或参考答案对输出进行评分、验证或拒绝，而无需修改原始制品。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 审查优化

evaluation_criteria.description: Rubric, schema, or test cases used for assessment.

pass_threshold.description: Minimum score or condition required for acceptance.

nodes.label: Feedback
nodes.description:
A signal from an evaluator, reviewer, or human operator back to a generator or orchestrator, carrying scores,
critiques, or continuation directives.
nodes.description_zh: 从评估者、审阅者或操作员返回到生成器或编排器的信号，携带分数、批评或继续指令。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 共享状态

feedback_type.description: Semantic category of the feedback payload.

target_ref.description: Reference to the component that should consume this feedback.

actionable.description: Whether the feedback includes specific revision instructions.

nodes.label: Gate
nodes.description:
A conditional checkpoint between workflow steps that permits, blocks, or reroutes execution based on predicates,
policy outcomes, or quality thresholds.
nodes.description_zh: 工作流步骤之间的条件检查点，根据谓词、策略结果或质量阈值允许、阻止或重新路由执行。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 工作流结构 / 路由控制

gate_type.description: Mechanism used to evaluate whether traversal is allowed.

predicate.description: Expression or rule set evaluated at the gate.

on_fail_action.description: Behavior when the gate condition is not satisfied.

nodes.label: Group Conversation
nodes.description:
Multi-agent dialogue coordination where multiple participants exchange messages under turn-taking, broadcast,
or moderated discussion rules.
nodes.description_zh: 多智能体对话协调，多个参与者在轮流、广播或主持的讨论规则下交换消息。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 共享状态

participant_refs.description: List of agent or human participant identifiers.

max_turns.description: Maximum dialogue turns before forced termination or summarization.

nodes.label: Handoff
nodes.description:
Transfer of control, context, and partial results from one agent or workflow step to another, preserving continuity
while resetting execution scope as needed.
nodes.description_zh: 将控制、上下文和部分结果从一个智能体或工作流程步骤转移到另一个智能体或工作流程步骤，保持连续性，同时根据需要重置执行范围。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 并行控制 / 委派控制

context_payload.description: Serialized context and state passed to the receiving party.

acknowledgment_required.description: Whether the receiver must confirm acceptance before proceeding.

nodes.label: Optimizer
nodes.description:
An iterative improver that revises generated outputs based on evaluator feedback until quality thresholds are
met or iteration budget is exhausted.
nodes.description_zh: 迭代改进器，根据评估器反馈修改生成的输出，直到满足质量阈值或迭代预算耗尽。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 审查优化

max_iterations.description: Maximum revision cycles before forced termination.

improvement_strategy.description: Approach for applying feedback to outputs.

convergence_threshold.description: Score delta below which iteration stops.

nodes.label: Orchestrator
nodes.description:
A dynamic task decomposer and coordinator that breaks high-level goals into subtasks, assigns them to workers
or tools, monitors progress, and aggregates results.
nodes.description_zh: 动态任务分解器和协调器，将高级目标分解为子任务，将它们分配给工作人员或工具，监控进度并汇总结果。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 编排根

decomposition_strategy.description: Approach for breaking goals into subtasks.

max_delegation_depth.description: Maximum nesting depth for subagent delegation chains.

nodes.label: Parallelization
nodes.description:
Concurrent execution of independent branches with a defined join strategy for aggregating partial results into
a unified outcome.
nodes.description_zh: 并发执行独立分支，并使用定义的连接策略将部分结果聚合成统一的结果。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 并行控制 / 委派控制

join_strategy.description: How branch outputs are combined at join time.

max_concurrency.description: Maximum number of branches executing simultaneously.

branch_timeout_seconds.description: Wall-clock limit applied per branch before join proceeds.

nodes.label: Prompt Chain
nodes.description:
A fixed sequential pipeline of language-model calls where each stage consumes the prior stage output as context,
enabling deterministic multi-step reasoning without dynamic routing.
nodes.description_zh: 语言模型调用的固定顺序管道，其中每个阶段将前一阶段的输出用作上下文，从而无需动态路由即可实现确定性多步骤推理。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 工作流结构 / 路由控制

stage_count.description: Number of sequential model invocation stages in the chain.

stage_definitions.description: Ordered list of stage prompts, schemas, and output contracts.

carry_forward_fields.description: Fields propagated unchanged across all stages.

nodes.label: Review
nodes.description:
An explicit human or language-model assessment step that critiques, verifies, or approves intermediate results
before they propagate downstream.
nodes.description_zh: 明确的人类或语言模型评估步骤，用于在中间结果传播到下游之前对其进行批评、验证或批准。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 审查优化

approval_required.description: Whether downstream steps are blocked until approval.

nodes.label: Route
nodes.description:
One branch option emitted by a router, binding a classification label to a downstream handler, workflow fragment,
or specialist agent.
nodes.description_zh: 由路由器发出的一个分支选项，将分类标签绑定到下游处理程序、工作流片段或专家智能体。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 工作流结构 / 路由控制

route_id.description: Unique label for this branch within the parent router.

match_criteria.description: Classification labels or patterns that activate this route.

target_ref.description: Reference to the downstream handler, workflow, or agent.

nodes.label: Router
nodes.description:
An input classifier that inspects task state or user intent and dispatches work to one or more specialist handlers,
tools, or sub-workflows via discrete routes.
nodes.description_zh: 一种输入分类器，用于检查任务状态或用户意图，并通过离散路径将工作分派给一个或多个专业处理程序、工具或子工作流。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 工作流结构 / 路由控制

classification_schema.description: Output schema defining route labels and confidence scores.

default_route_id.description: Fallback route when classification confidence is below threshold.

confidence_threshold.description: Minimum score required to select a non-default route.

nodes.label: Sectioning
nodes.description:
A parallelization pattern that splits a task or input into independent non-overlapping subtasks processed concurrently
and merged at completion.
nodes.description_zh: 一种并行化模式，将任务或输入拆分为独立的非重叠子任务，并发处理并在完成时合并。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 并行控制 / 委派控制

partition_strategy.description: Method used to divide input into sections.

section_count.description: Target or actual number of sections produced.

overlap_allowed.description: Whether sections may share overlapping content.

nodes.label: Subagent
nodes.description:
A spawned agent instance with delegated context, scoped goal, and bounded tool access, operating semi-autonomously
under a delegation contract.
nodes.description_zh: 生成的智能体实例具有委托上下文、范围目标和有限工具访问权限，在委托合同下半自主运行。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 并行控制 / 委派控制

scope_goal.description: The delegated objective assigned to this subagent.

context_boundary.description: Fields and memory regions accessible to the subagent.

parent_ref.description: Reference to the delegating orchestrator or parent agent.

nodes.label: Task Distribution
nodes.description:
The operation of assigning decomposed subtasks to available workers or subagents according to a load-balancing,
affinity, or capability-matching policy.
nodes.description_zh: 根据负载平衡、关联性或能力匹配策略将分解的子任务分配给可用工作人员或子代理的操作。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 并行控制 / 委派控制

distribution_policy.description: Rule for mapping subtasks to executors.

pending_queue.description: Ordered queue of subtasks awaiting assignment.

nodes.label: Think As Tool
nodes.description:
Extended internal reasoning exposed as an invocable tool, enabling staged deliberation separate from action
tools and observable in the execution trace.
nodes.description_zh: 扩展的内部推理作为可调用工具公开，支持与操作工具分开的分阶段审议，并可在执行跟踪中观察到。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 审查优化

reasoning_budget_tokens.description: Maximum tokens allocated per think invocation.

output_schema.description: Structured schema for reasoning conclusions returned to caller.

visible_in_transcript.description: Whether reasoning output appears in the public transcript.

nodes.label: Voting
nodes.description:
A parallelization pattern that runs the same task multiple times with varied parameters or sampling, then selects
or synthesizes the best outcome via vote or consensus.
nodes.description_zh: 一种并行化模式，使用不同的参数或采样多次运行相同的任务，然后通过投票或共识选择或综合最佳结果。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 并行控制 / 委派控制

selection_method.description: Rule for choosing the winning output.

nodes.label: Worker
nodes.description:
A specialist agent or executor that performs a single delegated subtask within bounded scope and returns structured
results to the orchestrator.
nodes.description_zh: 专业智能体或执行者，在有限范围内执行单个委托子任务并向协调器返回结构化结果。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 并行控制 / 委派控制

specialization.description: Domain or capability focus of this worker.

capability_refs.description: List of tool or skill references available to this worker.

reporting_format.description: Schema for structured subtask completion reports.

nodes.label: Workflow
nodes.description:
A directed graph of processing steps that defines how a multi-step agent task is executed from initiation through
completion, including dependencies, gates, and aggregation points.
nodes.description_zh: 处理步骤的有向图，定义多步骤智能体任务从启动到完成的执行方式，包括依赖性、门和聚合点。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 工作流结构 / 路由控制

name.description: Human-readable identifier for the workflow definition.

version.description: Semantic version or revision tag of the workflow schema.

entry_node_id.description: Identifier of the first step executed when the workflow starts.

max_parallelism.description: Upper bound on concurrently active branches within this workflow.

nodes.label: Workflow Edge
nodes.description:
A directed transition or dependency between two workflow nodes specifying execution order, data flow, or conditional
activation preconditions.
nodes.description_zh: 两个工作流节点之间的定向转换或依赖关系，指定执行顺序、数据流或条件激活前提条件。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 工作流结构 / 路由控制

from_step_id.description: Source step identifier in the parent workflow.

to_step_id.description: Target step identifier in the parent workflow.

condition.description: Optional predicate expression that must evaluate true for traversal.

data_mapping.description: Field-level mapping from source outputs to target inputs.

nodes.label: Workflow Node
nodes.description:
A single processing step within a workflow graph. Each node encapsulates one unit of work—such as generation,
transformation, evaluation, or delegation—and declares its inputs, outputs, and successor edges.
nodes.description_zh: 工作流程图中的单个处理步骤。每个节点都封装一个工作单元（例如生成、转换、评估或委托），并声明其输入、输出和后继边。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 工作流结构 / 路由控制

step_id.description: Unique identifier of this step within the parent workflow.

step_type.description: Category of processing performed at this step.

timeout_seconds.description: Maximum wall-clock duration permitted for this step before failure.

retryable.description: Whether this step may be retried on transient failure.

nodes.label: Cancellation
nodes.description:
Mechanism for stopping in-progress execution cooperatively or forcibly, propagating termination signals through
runs, turns, and sandbox processes.
nodes.description_zh: 协作或强制停止正在进行的执行，通过运行、轮转和沙箱进程传播终止信号的机制。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 恢复策略 / 预算控制

cancellation_type.description: Grace level of the stop request.

nodes.label: Checkpoint
nodes.description: Serialized state snapshot enabling resumption of execution after pause, interrupt, or failure.
nodes.description_zh: 序列化状态快照可在暂停、中断或失败后恢复执行。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 状态连续性 / 可观测性

state_blob_ref.description: Storage reference to serialized state payload.

created_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when snapshot was taken.

nodes.label: Command
nodes.description: A shell command or executable invocation dispatched to a process within the sandbox.
nodes.description_zh: 调度到沙箱内进程的 shell 命令或可执行调用。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 执行器与沙箱 / 执行会话

command_line.description: Full command string or argv array.

working_directory.description: Directory from which the command executes.

environment.description: Environment variables supplied to the process.

nodes.label: Container
nodes.description:
OS-level process isolation boundary providing namespace separation, cgroup limits, and lifecycle management
for sandboxed workloads.
nodes.description_zh: 操作系统级进程隔离边界为沙盒工作负载提供命名空间分离、cgroup 限制和生命周期管理。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 执行器与沙箱 / 执行会话

container_id.description: Runtime identifier of the isolated environment.

image_ref.description: Reference to the base environment image or filesystem snapshot.

nodes.label: Context Reset
nodes.description:
Controlled flush of the ephemeral context window while preserving durable session state, checkpoints, and external
memory references.
nodes.description_zh: 控制临时上下文窗口的刷新，同时保留持久会话状态、检查点和外部内存引用。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 状态连续性 / 可观测性

preserve_refs.description: Memory and checkpoint references retained after reset.

trigger_reason.description: Human-readable reason for the reset operation.

nodes.label: Continuation
nodes.description: A resumable execution point referencing a checkpoint from which a paused or interrupted run may proceed.
nodes.description_zh: 引用检查点的可恢复执行点，暂停或中断的运行可以从该检查点继续进行。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 状态连续性 / 可观测性

continuation_token.description: Opaque token identifying the resume point.

expires_at.description: Optional expiration after which continuation is invalid.

nodes.label: Cost Budget
nodes.description: Maximum monetary cost allocatable per run or session across model inference, tool usage, and external API calls.
nodes.description_zh: 每次运行或会话在模型推理、工具使用和外部 API 调用中可分配的最大货币成本。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 恢复策略 / 预算控制

max_cost_units.description: Maximum spend in configured currency or credit units.

alert_threshold_fraction.description: Fraction of budget at which warnings are emitted.

nodes.label: Event
nodes.description:
A discrete occurrence in the execution timeline such as tool invocation, policy decision, checkpoint, error,
or state transition.
nodes.description_zh: 执行时间线中的离散事件，例如工具调用、策略决策、检查点、错误或状态转换。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 状态连续性 / 可观测性

causal_parent_id.description: Optional reference to the triggering event.

nodes.label: Execution Harness
nodes.description:
Top-level runtime container that hosts agent sessions, manages lifecycle policies, and provides the infrastructure
for runs, tracing, and recovery.
nodes.description_zh: 顶级运行时容器，用于托管智能体会话、管理生命周期策略并提供运行、跟踪和恢复的基础架构。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 运行时根

harness_id.description: Unique identifier of this runtime installation.

supported_features.description: Capability flags for checkpointing, streaming, sandboxing.

default_policies.description: Default timeout, retry, and budget policy references.

nodes.label: Executor
nodes.description:
Runtime component responsible for running actions, commands, and tool invocations within a configured sandbox
and policy envelope.
nodes.description_zh: 运行时组件负责在配置的沙箱和策略信封内运行操作、命令和工具调用。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 执行器与沙箱 / 执行会话

max_concurrent_actions.description: Upper bound on parallel action executions.

nodes.label: Handoff Artifact
nodes.description: Serialized context and state package prepared for inter-agent transfer across execution boundaries.
nodes.description_zh: 为跨执行边界的智能体间传输准备的序列化上下文和状态包。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 状态连续性 / 可观测性

artifact_id.description: Unique identifier for this handoff package.

source_run_id.description: Run that produced this handoff artifact.

nodes.label: Process
nodes.description: A running OS process within a container executing commands on behalf of the agent.
nodes.description_zh: 容器内运行的操作系统进程，代表智能体执行命令。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 执行器与沙箱 / 执行会话

nodes.label: Recovery Policy
nodes.description:
Strategy for recovering from failures including checkpoint restore, partial replay, idempotent retry, or graceful
degradation.
nodes.description_zh: 从故障中恢复的策略，包括检查点恢复、部分重放、幂等重试或优雅降级。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 恢复策略 / 预算控制

max_recovery_attempts.description: Maximum recovery cycles before terminal failure.

fallback_action.description: Action taken when recovery is exhausted.

nodes.label: Resource Budget
nodes.description: Limits on compute, memory, storage, and concurrent operations allocatable per run or session.
nodes.description_zh: 每次运行或会话可分配的计算、内存、存储和并发操作的限制。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 恢复策略 / 预算控制

cpu_limit.description: Maximum CPU cores or time-share fraction.

nodes.label: Retry Policy
nodes.description:
Rules governing automatic retry of failed operations including backoff, jitter, maximum attempts, and retriable
error classification.
nodes.description_zh: 管理失败操作自动重试的规则，包括退避、抖动、最大尝试次数和可重试错误分类。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 恢复策略 / 预算控制

max_attempts.description: Maximum retry attempts including the initial try.

retriable_errors.description: Error codes or categories eligible for retry.

nodes.label: Run
nodes.description:
A single goal-directed execution within a session, bounded by budgets and policies, producing a transcript and
trace from initialization through completion or cancellation.
nodes.description_zh: 会话内的单一目标导向执行，受预算和政策限制，生成从初始化到完成或取消的记录和跟踪。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 执行器与沙箱 / 执行会话

run_id.description: Unique identifier for this execution attempt.

goal.description: Natural-language or structured objective driving this run.

nodes.label: Sandbox
nodes.description:
Isolated execution environment enforcing resource limits, network policy, and filesystem boundaries for untrusted
agent-generated actions.
nodes.description_zh: 隔离的执行环境对不受信任的智能体生成的操作实施资源限制、网络策略和文件系统边界。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 执行器与沙箱 / 执行会话

resource_limits.description: CPU, memory, and storage caps enforced in this sandbox.

nodes.label: Session
nodes.description:
Persistent conversational context spanning multiple goal-directed runs, retaining identity, preferences, and
cross-run state distinct from the ephemeral context window.
nodes.description_zh: 持久的会话上下文跨越多个目标导向的运行，保留身份、偏好和与短暂上下文窗口不同的跨运行状态。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 执行器与沙箱 / 执行会话

session_id.description: Stable identifier for this conversational session.

participant_refs.description: Human and agent identities associated with the session.

nodes.label: State Store
nodes.description: Persistent backend for checkpoint data, continuation tokens, and resumable execution artifacts.
nodes.description_zh: 检查点数据、延续令牌和可恢复执行制品的持久后端。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 状态连续性 / 可观测性

retention_days.description: Default retention period for stored snapshots.

encryption_enabled.description: Whether stored payloads are encrypted at rest.

nodes.label: Stderr Stream
nodes.description: Standard error data stream capturing diagnostic and error output from sandboxed processes.
nodes.description_zh: 标准错误数据流捕获沙盒进程的诊断和错误输出。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 执行器与沙箱 / 执行会话

truncated.description: Whether output was truncated due to size limits.

nodes.label: Stdout Stream
nodes.description: Standard output data stream capturing process-produced text or binary output for agent consumption.
nodes.description_zh: 标准输出数据流捕获流程生成的文本或二进制输出以供智能体使用。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 执行器与沙箱 / 执行会话

truncated.description: Whether output was truncated due to size limits.

nodes.label: Timeout Policy
nodes.description:
Rules defining maximum wall-clock duration for operations, turns, runs, or sandbox commands before automatic
cancellation or escalation.
nodes.description_zh: 定义自动取消或升级之前操作、转弯、运行或沙箱命令的最大挂钟持续时间的规则。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 恢复策略 / 预算控制

default_timeout_seconds.description: Default timeout applied when none specified.

nodes.label: Token Budget
nodes.description:
Maximum token consumption for language-model calls within a run, turn, or session, enforcing cost and latency
guardrails.
nodes.description_zh: 运行、轮次或会话中语言模型调用的最大令牌消耗，强制实施成本和延迟防护。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 恢复策略 / 预算控制

nodes.label: Trace
nodes.description:
Structured execution log capturing timing, causality, and span hierarchy for debugging, observability, and performance
analysis.
nodes.description_zh: 结构化执行日志捕获时序、因果关系和跨度层次结构，用于调试、可观察性和性能分析。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 状态连续性 / 可观测性

trace_id.description: Unique identifier for this execution trace.

span_count.description: Number of spans in the trace tree.

sampling_rate.description: Fraction of operations captured when sampling is enabled.

nodes.label: Transcript
nodes.description:
An ordered record of all turns and messages comprising the session narrative; distinct from durable memory and
subject to compaction policies.
nodes.description_zh: 包含会话叙述的所有回合和消息的有序记录；与持久内存不同，并受压缩策略的约束。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 状态连续性 / 可观测性

message_count.description: Total messages recorded in the transcript.

compaction_policy_ref.description: Reference to rules governing transcript truncation.

nodes.label: Turn
nodes.description:
One request-response cycle within a run, comprising user or system input, agent reasoning, tool invocations,
and the resulting assistant output.
nodes.description_zh: 运行中的一个请求-响应周期，包括用户或系统输入、智能体推理、工具调用以及生成的辅助输出。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 执行器与沙箱 / 执行会话

turn_index.description: Zero-based ordinal of this turn within the parent run.

input_tokens.description: Token count of input context for this turn.

output_tokens.description: Token count of generated output for this turn.

nodes.label: Allowed List
nodes.description:
Explicit enumeration of permitted operations, resources, or endpoints beyond which all unmatched requests are
denied by default.
nodes.description_zh: 显式枚举允许的操作、资源或端点，默认情况下会拒绝所有不匹配的请求。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 权限决策 / 权限边界

entries.description: List of permitted operation patterns or resource identifiers.

list_scope.description: Scope to which this list applies.

nodes.label: Allow Decision
nodes.description: Policy outcome permitting a requested action within the granted scope and attached conditions.
nodes.description_zh: 政策结果允许在授予的范围和附加条件内采取所请求的行动。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 权限决策 / 权限边界

conditions.description: Optional constraints attached to the allowance.

nodes.label: Approval Flow
nodes.description: Human-in-the-loop approval process requiring explicit authorization before high-risk or sensitive actions proceed.
nodes.description_zh: 在进行高风险或敏感操作之前需要明确授权的人机交互审批流程。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 人工治理 / 威胁检测

timeout_seconds.description: Duration before pending approval times out.

auto_deny_on_timeout.description: Whether timeout results in denial rather than escalation.

nodes.label: Audit Log
nodes.description:
Immutable append-only record of security-relevant events including policy decisions, tool invocations, access
attempts, and escalations.
nodes.description_zh: 安全相关事件的不可变的仅附加记录，包括策略决策、工具调用、访问尝试和升级。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 人工治理 / 威胁检测

retention_days.description: Minimum retention period for audit entries.

tamper_evident.description: Whether log integrity is cryptographically protected.

nodes.label: Cognitive Executive Separation
nodes.description:
Architectural separation ensuring reasoning and planning components cannot directly execute side-effecting actions
without passing through an executive gate.
nodes.description_zh: 架构分离确保推理和规划组件在不通过执行门的情况下无法直接执行副作用操作。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 认知执行分离 / 信息流控制

executive_component_ref.description: Reference to the action dispatch module.

bypass_prohibited.description: Whether direct reasoning-to-action paths are forbidden.

nodes.label: Credential Proxy
nodes.description:
Intermediary that rewrites authentication headers and tokens so secrets never enter the untrusted sandbox or
agent context.
nodes.description_zh: 重写身份验证标头和令牌的中介，以便秘密永远不会进入不受信任的沙箱或智能体上下文。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 认知执行分离 / 信息流控制

proxy_endpoint.description: Address of the credential injection proxy.

token_lifetime_seconds.description: Maximum lifetime of injected short-lived tokens.

auditable.description: Whether all proxy invocations are logged.

nodes.label: Data Label
nodes.description:
Integrity or confidentiality tag attached to data artifacts, governing where they may be stored, transmitted,
or included in model context.
nodes.description_zh: 附加到数据制品的完整性或机密性标签，控制它们可以存储、传输或包含在模型上下文中的位置。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 认知执行分离 / 信息流控制

source_ref.description: Origin entity that applied this label.

nodes.label: Denied List
nodes.description: Explicit enumeration of forbidden operations or resources that override allow rules regardless of other permissions.
nodes.description_zh: 显式枚举禁止的操作或资源，无论其他权限如何，都会覆盖允许规则。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 权限决策 / 权限边界

entries.description: List of forbidden operation patterns or resource identifiers.

list_scope.description: Scope to which this list applies.

nodes.label: Deny Decision
nodes.description: Policy outcome blocking a requested action, returning rationale and optional retry guidance.
nodes.description_zh: 政策结果阻止请求的操作，返回理由和可选的重试指导。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 权限决策 / 权限边界

retry_allowed.description: Whether the agent may retry with modified parameters.

nodes.label: Escalation
nodes.description:
Elevation of a policy decision or blocked action to a higher authority, human reviewer, or broader permission
tier.
nodes.description_zh: 将政策决定或受阻行动提升至更高权威机构、人工审核员或更广泛的权限级别。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 人工治理 / 威胁检测

original_decision_ref.description: Reference to the decision being escalated.

nodes.label: File Policy
nodes.description:
Rules governing filesystem access including read/write path allow lists, temporary directory scoping, and sensitive
path blocks.
nodes.description_zh: 管理文件系统访问的规则，包括读/写路径允许列表、临时目录范围和敏感路径块。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 认知执行分离 / 信息流控制

read_allowed_paths.description: Directories and files permitted for read access.

blocked_paths.description: Paths unconditionally denied regardless of other rules.

nodes.label: Human Review
nodes.description: Human assessment of a proposed agent action, providing approve, deny, or modify decisions before execution proceeds.
nodes.description_zh: 对拟议的智能体操作进行人工评估，在执行继续之前提供批准、拒绝或修改决策。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 人工治理 / 威胁检测

review_deadline.description: Optional ISO-8601 deadline for review completion.

nodes.label: Information Flow Control
nodes.description:
Framework for data label propagation and enforcement ensuring sensitive information does not flow to unauthorized
sinks.
nodes.description_zh: 数据标签传播和执行框架，确保敏感信息不会流向未经授权的接收器。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 认知执行分离 / 信息流控制

label_hierarchy.description: Ordering of confidentiality and integrity labels.

flow_rules.description: Rules defining permitted label transitions across boundaries.

nodes.label: Least Privilege
nodes.description:
Principle requiring that every agent, tool, and process receive only the minimal permissions necessary to accomplish
its current task.
nodes.description_zh: 该原则要求每个智能体、工具和流程仅接收完成其当前任务所需的最少权限。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 权限决策 / 权限边界

baseline_permissions.description: Default minimal permission set for new sessions.

monotonic_reduction.description: Whether permissions may only decrease without explicit elevation.

nodes.label: Network Policy
nodes.description:
Rules for network access enforcing deny-by-default egress with explicit allow lists for domains, ports, and
protocols.
nodes.description_zh: 通过域、端口和协议的显式允许列表强制执行默认拒绝出口的网络访问规则。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 认知执行分离 / 信息流控制

nodes.label: Pattern Scan
nodes.description:
Signature-based scanning of inputs and outputs for known attack patterns, policy violations, or sensitive data
leakage.
nodes.description_zh: 对输入和输出进行基于签名的扫描，以查找已知的攻击模式、策略违规或敏感数据泄漏。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 人工治理 / 威胁检测

pattern_library_ref.description: Reference to the signature rule set.

scan_targets.description: Input, output, or tool-result channels subject to scanning.

nodes.label: Permission Policy
nodes.description:
Rules governing which actions an agent or tool may perform, evaluated at invocation time against allow and deny
lists.
nodes.description_zh: 管理智能体或工具可以执行哪些操作的规则，在调用时根据允许和拒绝列表进行评估。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 权限决策 / 权限边界

default_effect.description: Effect when no explicit rule matches.

nodes.label: Policy Contract
nodes.description:
Abstract safety and governance policy defining rules, enforcement points, and escalation paths applicable to
guarded operations.
nodes.description_zh: 抽象安全和治理策略定义适用于受保护操作的规则、执行点和升级路径。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 策略根

policy_id.description: Unique identifier for this policy definition.

policy_version.description: Semantic version of the policy schema.

nodes.label: Privilege Control
nodes.description:
Mechanism enforcing least privilege by dynamically scoping permissions to the minimum necessary for the current
operation.
nodes.description_zh: 通过动态地将权限范围限制为当前操作所需的最小权限来强制执行最小权限的机制。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 权限决策 / 权限边界

elevation_requires_approval.description: Whether privilege elevation triggers approval flow.

scope_reduction_on_completion.description: Whether elevated permissions auto-revoke after use.

nodes.label: Prompt Injection Defense
nodes.description:
Detection and prevention mechanisms guarding against adversarial instructions embedded in untrusted inputs that
attempt to override system behavior.
nodes.description_zh: 检测和预防机制可防止嵌入在不受信任的输入中试图覆盖系统行为的对抗性指令。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 人工治理 / 威胁检测

detection_methods.description: Heuristic, model-based, or rule-based detection techniques.

nodes.label: Rollback
nodes.description:
Reversal of a completed action to restore prior state when post-execution review determines the action was unauthorized
or harmful.
nodes.description_zh: 当执行后审查确定该操作未经授权或有害时，撤消已完成的操作以恢复之前的状态。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 认知执行分离 / 信息流控制

target_action_ref.description: Reference to the action being reversed.

verification_required.description: Whether rollback success must be confirmed before closing.

nodes.label: Sandbox Policy
nodes.description:
Rules governing sandbox configuration including resource limits, allowed syscalls, mount points, and network
isolation defaults.
nodes.description_zh: 管理沙箱配置的规则，包括资源限制、允许的系统调用、挂载点和网络隔离默认值。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 认知执行分离 / 信息流控制

resource_caps.description: CPU, memory, disk, and process limits.

allowed_syscalls.description: System call allow list when seccomp is enabled.

nodes.label: Secret
nodes.description:
Sensitive credential, API key, or cryptographic material that must never appear in agent context, logs, or sandbox
filesystems.
nodes.description_zh: 敏感凭证、API 密钥或加密材料绝不能出现在智能体上下文、日志或沙箱文件系统中。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 认知执行分离 / 信息流控制

storage_backend.description: Secure vault or key management reference.

nodes.label: Taint
nodes.description:
Untrusted data marking that propagates through processing, preventing tainted values from influencing security-sensitive
operations without sanitization.
nodes.description_zh: 通过处理传播的不受信任的数据标记，防止受污染的值在未经清理的情况下影响安全敏感操作。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 认知执行分离 / 信息流控制

propagation_rules.description: Operations that preserve or remove taint.

nodes.label: Trust Boundary
nodes.description:
Demarcation between trusted and untrusted domains, defining where policy enforcement must occur before data
or control crosses the boundary.
nodes.description_zh: 可信域和不可信域之间的划分，定义在数据或控制跨越边界之前必须执行策略的位置。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 权限决策 / 权限边界

nodes.label: Warning
nodes.description:
Non-blocking security alert emitted when policy detects a suspicious but permitted condition requiring operator
awareness.
nodes.description_zh: 当策略检测到需要操作员注意的可疑但允许的情况时，会发出非阻塞安全警报。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 人工治理 / 威胁检测

message.description: Human-readable description of the detected condition.

related_event_id.description: Optional reference to the triggering event.

nodes.label: Protocol Artifact
nodes.description: File or structured data produced during task execution and returned to the delegating participant via protocol artifact exchange.
nodes.description_zh: 任务执行期间生成的文件或结构化数据，并通过协议制品交换返回给委托参与者。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 产物平面

artifact_id.description: Unique artifact identifier within task scope

content_ref.description: Reference to artifact payload or storage location

nodes.label: Authorization Scheme
nodes.description: Authentication and authorization method required or supported by a protocol endpoint, including credential types and token exchange flows.
nodes.description_zh: 协议端点所需或支持的身份验证和授权方法，包括凭证类型和令牌交换流程。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 授权平面 / 能力平面

required_scopes.description: OAuth or custom scope identifiers required for access

nodes.label: Cancellation Signal
nodes.description: Protocol message requesting abort of an in-progress operation or task, propagating cancellation intent to executing endpoints.
nodes.description_zh: 请求中止正在进行的操作或任务的协议消息，将取消意图传播到执行端点。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 任务平面 / 消息平面

target_task_id.description: Task or operation identifier to cancel

graceful.description: Whether to allow graceful shutdown before hard abort

nodes.label: Capability Manifest
nodes.description: Published declaration enumerating tools, resources, prompts, and protocol extensions an endpoint supports, used for discovery and negotiation.
nodes.description_zh: 已发布的声明枚举端点支持的工具、资源、提示和协议扩展，用于发现和协商。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 授权平面 / 能力平面

published_at.description: Timestamp when manifest was last published

nodes.label: Capability Negotiation
nodes.description: Process by which protocol participants exchange and agree on supported features, extensions, protocol versions, and operational limits at connect time.
nodes.description_zh: 协议参与者在连接时就支持的功能、扩展、协议版本和操作限制进行交换并达成一致的过程。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 授权平面 / 能力平面

nodes.label: Error Envelope
nodes.description: Structured error response wrapping protocol-level failures with error codes, messages, retry hints, and optional diagnostic details.
nodes.description_zh: 结构化错误响应包含错误代码、消息、重试提示和可选诊断详细信息的协议级故障。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 任务平面 / 消息平面

retryable.description: Whether the failed operation may be retried

nodes.label: Message Envelope
nodes.description: Structured wrapper for protocol messages carrying headers, routing metadata, correlation identifiers, and typed payload references.
nodes.description_zh: 用于携带标头、路由元数据、相关标识符和类型化有效负载引用的协议消息的结构化包装器。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 任务平面 / 消息平面

reply_to.description: Message id this message responds to

nodes.label: Message Part
nodes.description: Individual segment of a multi-part message supporting heterogeneous content types such as text, images, structured data, or file references.
nodes.description_zh: 多部分消息的各个片段支持异构内容类型，例如文本、图像、结构化数据或文件引用。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 任务平面 / 消息平面

part_index.description: Zero-based ordering index within parent message

content_ref.description: Reference to inline or external content

nodes.label: Progress Event
nodes.description: Status update emitted during long-running operations reporting fractional completion, stage transitions, or intermediate metrics.
nodes.description_zh: 在报告部分完成情况、阶段转换或中间指标的长时间运行操作期间发出的状态更新。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 任务平面 / 消息平面

nodes.label: Prompt Exposure
nodes.description: A parameterized prompt template exposed through a protocol that clients can materialize into messages with supplied arguments.
nodes.description_zh: 通过协议公开的参数化提示模板，客户端可以使用提供的参数将其具体化为消息。
nodes.intra_axis_zh: 授权平面 / 能力平面

template_ref.description: Reference to underlying prompt template content

role_hint.description: Suggested message role for materialized prompt

nodes.label: Protocol
